tailored_sections.summary: Engineered robust software components to optimize system performance and reliability.

projects.name: ScaleResilient API Gateway
description: Engineered scalable backend service APIs in Python using FastAPI, resulting in 25% reduction in endpoint latency.
Spearheaded database query optimizations and caching layer integration via PostgreSQL and Redis, reducing request bottlenecks by 25%.

recruiter_suggestions: Professional Summary is too brief. Expand to 3 structured lines.

recommended_projects: Design an Async REST API: Develop a high-performance database service in FastAPI with async SQLAlchemy sessions, Pydantic v2 schemas, and OAuth2 security profiles.

likely_interview_topics: RESTful API design and status protocols
recommended_preparation_topics: Practice standard whiteboard/LeetCode array and string iterations.
Mock explain your projects using STAR methodology.
Revise SQL join structures and indexes.
Build a miniature proof-of-concept project integrating fastapi.

structural_changes: Repositioned professional summary to emphasize backend APIs and adjacent transferable architectures.
Adapted experience bullets across all 0 employment roles, aligning metric presentations to target hiring objectives.

progression_path.title: Backend Engineering Intern
progression_path.milestone: Master SQL index setups and API route containerization.

progression_path.milestone: Own REST endpoint integrations and async database pools.

progression_path.title: Senior Systems / AI Infrastructure Engineer
progression_path.milestone: Orchestrate Kubernetes clusters and high-throughput data streams.

career_progression.suggested_career_transition: Aim for the next milestone: Software Engineer II (Systems) (2-3 years)
career_progression.next_technical_goal: Design scalable Redis caching architectures and gRPC pipelines.

interview_prep_checklist: Practice explaining your project milestones using the STAR model (Situation, Task, Action, Result).
Be prepared to detail technical tradeoffs (concurrency vs simplicity, memory vs processing).

technical: What is the difference in Python between multi-threading, multi-processing, and async/await task loops?
How do indexing structures and B-Trees operate inside PostgreSQL databases to accelerate query lookups?
project_based: On your project 'ScaleResilient API Gateway' built using Python, FastAPI, Redis, how did you approach containerization or database setup to ensure system performance?
system_design: How would you design a scalable system structure to process high-throughput API requests for Stripe?
How do rate-limiting middleware algorithms (like token bucket) secure backend REST gateways?
behavioral: Tell me about a time you had to debug a complex production bottleneck under tight delivery constraints. How did you proceed?
How do you handle technical disagreements on API design patterns or framework choices with other engineers?

portfolio_assets.portfolio_markdown:
# Jordan Vance
Backend & Systems Software Engineer | Email: jordan@vance.dev

Dedicated software architect specializing in scalable REST interfaces, database optimization, and containerized devops workflows. Driven by code cleanliness and operational metrics.

## 🛠️ Technical Skill Matrix
- **Programming Languages**: Python, Go, TypeScript
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, Redis
- **Tools**: Docker, Kubernetes, Git

## 🚀 Featured Engineering Projects
### ScaleResilient API Gateway
*Stack: Python, FastAPI, Redis, Docker*

- Designed a rate-limited REST gateway processing 15k requests/sec.
- Integrated Redis connection pooling reducing server response times by 35%.

case_studies.relevance_summary: Designed and deployed 'ScaleResilient API Gateway' integrating Python, FastAPI, Redis to solve core systems bottlenecks.
case_studies.recruiter_takeaway: Showcases strong software engineering principles, robust integration testing, and quantified delivery metrics.

branding_profiles.linkedin_headline: Mid-Level Systems Engineer | Specialized in Backend Applications | Python | Go | TypeScript | PostgreSQL
branding_profiles.linkedin_about:
Hi, I'm Jordan Vance! I am a Mid-level software engineer obsessed with system latency, database optimization, and robust API development. Over my career, I've focused on translating complex business requirements into scale-resilient backends using Python, Go, TypeScript, PostgreSQL.

Key expertise:
• Asynchronous API routing and microservice gateways
• Relational database index tuning and query scaling
• Containerized deployments and devops pipeline automations
branding_profiles.github_bio: 💻 Systems Developer exploring Python, Go scaling architectures. Focused on metrics & clean code.
